description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn. The structure features a low-pitched, hip roof in a light gray color, and the exterior walls are finished in white. There is a small, covered porch at the front, supported by simple posts, and a wooden deck area leading to the entrance. Windows are modestly sized and arranged asymmetrically along the sides, providing natural light to the interior. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a hip roof, small front porch, and asymmetrical window arrangement on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long white wall with three windows and the edge of the front porch.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the small covered porch, entrance, and a single window beside the door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a long white wall and two windows, porch barely visible at the far end.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back wall with two windows and the hip roof's full slope.
